Package battleship.controller

Interface IBattleshipView

All Known Implementing Classes:
Battleship
public interface IBattleshipView
This interface contains all necessary classes of a view to be usable by the controller. View class contain additional methods, which will not accessible by the controller.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    drawGame()
    Shows the current game state of Battleship.
    void
    drawGG()
    Shows the game over screen of Battleship.
    void
    drawTitleScreen()
    Shows the title screen of Battleship.
    void
    loadImages(List<Cards> gameC, List<Cards> handC)
    This method takes the load the images of GameCards and first five HandCards.

  • Method Details

    • loadImages

      void loadImages(List<Cards> gameC, List<Cards> handC)
      This method takes the load the images of GameCards and first five HandCards. It takes the paths from lists of Game with the help of controller. It has not direct access on model.
      Parameters:
      gameC - the list of GameCards.
      handC - the list of HandCards.

    • drawTitleScreen

      void drawTitleScreen()
      Shows the title screen of Battleship.

    • drawGame

      void drawGame()
      Shows the current game state of Battleship. This display should display the cards images of GameCards, EnemyCards and HandCards. Also, player names and the infoBoxes for player. If the cards updated, this will also update the images of cards.

    • drawGG

      void drawGG()
      Shows the game over screen of Battleship.
